I. Define the role of the AI in creating a fully automated content production channel.  
II. Establish the constraints for AI-generated content, including accuracy and ethical guidelines.  
III. Specify the output format for the channel, such as video, audio, or text.  
IV. Implement error prevention mechanisms to ensure consistent quality and compliance.  

The AI will generate content based on user input and predefined rules. The content will be reviewed for accuracy and ethical compliance. The output will be formatted as a channel with designated sections. Errors will be logged and corrected to maintain quality.  

The AI will create content using natural language processing and machine learning. The content will be optimized for engagement and distribution. The output will be structured with clear sections and metadata. Errors will be identified and resolved to ensure consistency.
